info.name: Trendly Backend
info.description: Collaborations Lambda (`trendly_collabs`): routes under `/api/collabs`. Requires session auth (`ValidateSessionMiddleware`). Use a manager session for Manager folders and an influencer (`user`) session for Influencer folders (`TrendlyMiddleware`). Auth is not set on this collection — configure Bearer/session on your environment or parent collection.

item.name: Collaborations
item.description: Collaboration, contract, application, and feedback flows exposed by `functions/trendly_collabs`. Base path: `/api/collabs`.

item.name: Manager - Influencer unlock & chat
item.description: Brand manager endpoints to unlock an influencer (credits) and open a Stream chat channel. Requires `TrendlyMiddleware("managers")`.

variable.description: Firestore user ID of the influencer to unlock for the brand

request.description:
Adds the influencer to the brand's `UnlockedInfluencers` list. If newly added, decrements `brand.Credits.Influencer` by 1; returns 400 with `insufficient-credits` if credits are zero.

**Required body fields**
- `brandId` (string): Brand document ID.

**Side effects**: Persists brand; no email in this handler.

variable.description: Influencer user ID; must already appear in brand.UnlockedInfluencers

request.description:
Creates a Stream Chat `messaging` channel between the authenticated manager and the influencer, sends a system message, and may set `IsChatConnected` on manager and user.

**Required body fields**
- `brandId` (string): Brand document ID (used for unlock check and message text).

**Errors**: `influencer-locked` if influencer is not in unlocked list.

**Side effects**: Stream channel + system message; may update manager and user records.

item.name: Manager - Collaborations (AI & publish)
item.description: Draft collaborations via OpenAI and publish/post live with evaluation and credit handling.

request.description:
Generates a collaboration draft from a natural-language prompt using OpenAI.

**Required body fields**
- `prompt` (string): Non-empty description of the collaboration.

**Optional body fields**
- `brandId` (string): When set, loads brand context (about, industries, website, discover preferences) to improve generation.

**Success response**: `{ error: false, collaboration: ... }` (draft object from AI layer).

variable.description: Collaboration document ID to load from Firestore, evaluate, and save

request.description:
Loads the collaboration by ID, runs AI evaluation against guidelines, updates discover `Preferences` when valid, and handles posting: if status becomes `active` and not already posted, decrements `brand.Credits.Collaboration` and appends to `PostedCollaborations`. If active but evaluation fails, status may become `draft` and an email is sent to the manager (`CollaborationTakedown`).

**Request body**: None (collab is read from DB).

**Success**: `{ message, collabId, discoverFilters, updatedStatus }`.
**Failure (guidelines)**: 400 with `collaboration-payload-not-approved`, `discoverFilters`, `updatedStatus`.

item.name: Manager - Invitations & applications
item.description: Notify influencers of invitations and accept, reject, or request revision on applications.

request.description:
Manager-only. Loads invitation row for `(collabId, userId)`, then sends push notification (`invitation`), email (`InfluencerInvitedToCollab`), using manager name from session and optional `invite.Message` in template data.

**Request body**: None.

**Prerequisites**: Invitation document must exist for the pair.

variable.description: One of: `accept` (creates channel + contract, notifications + email + Stream), `reject` (ack only), `revise` (notify influencer to revise quotation; needs existing contract for collab+user)

request.description:
Manager-only (`userType` must be `manager`).

**Path `action` enum**
- `accept`: Creates Stream channel and contract via `CreateChannel`; push + email to influencer; Stream system message. Returns `channel`, `contract`, `contractId` (stream channel id string in response).
- `reject`: Returns success message only.
- `revise`: Push + email + Stream message asking to revise quotation; requires contract lookup by collab + user.

**Request body**: None.

item.name: Manager - Contract feedback
item.description: Brand member rates the influencer after the contract is post-done or settled.

request.description:
Authenticated user must be a `BrandMember` for the contract's brand. Allowed only when contract status is **post-done** or **settled** (`ContractStatusPostDone`, `ContractStatusSettled`).

**Required body fields**
- `ratings` (int): 1–5 inclusive.

**Optional body fields**
- `feedbackReview` (string): Free-text review.

**Side effects**: Writes `FeedbackFromBrand` on contract; push + email to influencer (`brand-feedback-given`, `CollaborationRatedByBrand`).

item.name: Influencer - Contracts & applications
item.description: Influencer (`user`) flows: poke brand to start contract, and notify brand of new or updated applications. Requires `TrendlyMiddleware("users")`.

variable.description: Contract ID — influencer on this contract triggers brand notifications

request.description:
Influencer asks the brand to start the contract. Creates brand notification (`contract-start-request`), emails brand members (`CollaborationStartRequested`), and sends a Stream system message on the contract channel.

**Request body**: None.

variable.description: Must match the authenticated influencer user ID (`userType` user)

request.description:
User-only. Loads application for `(collabId, userId)` and notifies the brand: push (`application`), email (`ApplicationSent`) with application timestamp from stored application.

**Request body**: None.

**Note**: Application row must already exist in Firestore before calling.

User-only. Same path as POST but **PUT**. Notifies brand of revised quotation: push (`new-quotation`), email with quotation and timeline from application, Stream system message on contract channel.

**Request body**: None (application data is read from DB).

**Prerequisites**: Contract must exist for collab + user for Stream step.

item.name: Influencer - Contract feedback
item.description: Influencer rates the brand after the contract is post-done or settled.

variable.description: Contract ID — session user must be `contract.UserId`

request.description:
Only the influencer on the contract may submit. Same status gate as brand feedback: **post-done** or **settled** only.

**Required body fields**
- `ratings` (int): 1–5 inclusive.

**Optional body fields**
- `feedbackReview` (string): Free-text review.

**Side effects**: Writes `FeedbackFromInfluencer`; push + email to brand (`feedback-given`, `CollaborationRatedByInfluencer`).
